text:
1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No outpatient services/ambulatory surgical care (revenue code other than 049X, 050X) 
1 = Outpatient services (revenue code 050X) 
2 = Ambulatory surgical care (revenue code 049X) 
3 = Outpatient services and ambulatory surgical care (revenue codes 049X and 050X) 

COMMENT: This field is derived by checking for the presence of the outpatient services revenue center codes (049X, 
050X) on any of the claim records included in the stay.
